caption: A person's hands are shown against a light-colored wooden surface, holding and interacting with a handmade greeting card. The card features a dark blue border and a central image of blue pine needles and snowflakes, with the text "You warm my heart" printed in a cursive font at the bottom. A thin white ribbon is attached to the left side of the card. In the initial sequence, the person's left hand holds the card steady. As the sequence progresses, the person's right hand enters the frame; first, a finger gently touches the right edge of the inner card, and then the finger points toward the image of the pine needles. A portion of another item, possibly a packaging sleeve, is visible on the left side of the wooden surface. The person is wearing a watch on their left wrist.
